scripts.build: node ../../scripts/prepare-workspace-package.cjs ../../.6529-deploy-packages/rememesLoop && esbuild index.ts --bundle --external:sharp --external:imagescript --sourcemap --platform=node --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/index.js && mkdir dist/native_modules && cp -r ../../.6529-deploy-packages/rememesLoop/node_modules/sharp dist/native_modules/sharp/ && cp -r ../../.6529-deploy-packages/rememesLoop/node_modules dist/node_modules
scripts.postbuild: cp rememes.csv dist && cd dist && zip -r index.zip * && cd .. && node ../../scripts/remove-paths.cjs ../../.6529-deploy-packages/rememesLoop
